title: Food intolerance documentation

examination.text: Supports duration, stool pattern, urgency, incontinence, weight loss, nocturnal symptoms, medicines, surgery, travel, family history, diet, and physical examination.
examination.rationale: The exact chronic-diarrhoea section supports food association, bowel pattern, duration, weight, nocturnal symptoms, blood, medicine, travel, family history, and clinician assessment without diagnosing intolerance.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports duration, stool pattern, urgency, incontinence, weight loss, nocturnal symptoms, medicines, surgery, travel, family history, diet, and physical examination.

source.title: Guidelines for the investigation of chronic diarrhoea in adults: British Society of Gastroenterology, 3rd edition

investigations.text: Supports clinician review of existing blood, stool, FIT, endoscopy, imaging, coeliac, bile-acid, microscopic-colitis, and lactose-malabsorption investigations.
investigations.rationale: The exact section supports existing test, endoscopy, and imaging context plus a clinician-entered plan without ordering elimination diets or tests.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician review of existing blood, stool, FIT, endoscopy, imaging, coeliac, bile-acid, microscopic-colitis, and lactose-malabsorption investigations.

source.title: Guidelines for the investigation of chronic diarrhoea in adults: British Society of Gastroenterology, 3rd edition

source_limitations: Specific food, timing, reproducibility, allergy features, nutrition, weight, diagnosis, test, elimination or challenge, and referral remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
